caption:
Neon kisses taste like rain and danger 💦🌧️.

The rain hammered against my synthetic trench coat as I slipped through the underbelly of Neo-Tokyo. My name's Aria, and in this chrome jungle, a tight bodysuit and a sharp mind are the only armor that matters. Tonight, the target was the Obsidian Tower, a fortress of data that only the legendary hackers could crack. I wore my lucky gear, a magnetic weave skirt that hugged my hips and a crop top that showcased my curves without giving away secrets. My cybernetic implants hummed, guiding me through the magnetic locks. The air smelled of ozone and expensive perfume. I moved like smoke, my body tense, my heart racing against the adrenaline. When the alarm blared, I didn't run; I leaned, letting the security drone scan my skin while I whispered the code into my ear. It was a dance of tech and thrill, a seduction of electricity. By the time the sun rose on a digital skyline, I was gone, leaving only a trail of neon lights and whispers.

#Cyberpunk #NeonVixen #SciFiErotica #FutureFashion #InstaHack
